movie.synopsis: Mahasenha is a mythological jungle thriller set in the mystichills of Kurangani, where an ancient Yaali sculpture, worshipped by the tribal villagers as a divine protector, becomes the center of a high-stakes conflict. The film delivers a powerful message : Faith is not just belief-its protection.
